overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and modern skyscrapers. The player explores the sunny coastal area, ascends stairs to an upper observation level, and watches flying vehicles pass overhead against a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront viewing area with benches facing the bay

events.description: camera pans right to face the bay water and benches
camera pans back left and begins turning to face the promenade walkway

agents.ego_description: standing at the waterfront, panning the camera to take in the view of the bay and city skyline

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass and steel towers forming the city skyline in the distance
calm body of water with distant industrial structures visible across the bay
row of palm trees lining the edge of the promenade
colorful benches with graffiti art facing the waterfront
metal safety railing separating the walkway from the water

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a panoramic view of a futuristic waterfront. The camera pans across the bay, showing green benches, palm trees, and the distant modern skyline under bright midday sun. The scene is quiet and empty before the camera turns to begin exploring the promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade with red building facade

events.description: begins walking forward along the waterfront promenade
flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the promenade, passing pedestrians and observing the flying traffic overhead

notable_agents.action: cyclist with red hair riding past the camera along the promenade
pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: large building with distinctive red paneling and concrete architectural elements
wide paved pedestrian path running parallel to the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along the waterfront promenade, passing by a cyclist and other pedestrians. A distinctive red building runs along the left side while palm trees line the right edge near the water. Flying vehicles pass overhead, and the city skyline looms ahead as the walkway continues toward a stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway transition to upper promenade level

events.description: approaches and begins ascending the concrete stairs to upper level
reaches the top of stairs and emerges onto the upper promenade

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs while passing other pedestrians moving up and down

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair and colorful outfit descending the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and climbs a wide concrete staircase leading to an upper observation level. Other pedestrians are seen moving up and down the stairs. The red building facade recedes into the background as the camera ascends, reaching the top where the upper promenade and benches become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront observation deck with benches

events.description: flying vehicle passes by at eye level over the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper promenade, observing the waterfront and flying traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian leaning on railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: elevated walkway with views of the lower level and bay
low rectangular structures floating on the water surface

segments.scene_description: Walking along the upper promenade level, the camera passes green benches where people are seated and observing the view. The elevated position provides clear views of the floating platforms on the water and the distant bridge. Flying vehicles pass by at eye level, and palm trees line the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sky observation area overlooking the bay

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on flying vehicles in the sky
multiple flying vehicles pass overhead in formation

agents.ego_description: standing still and looking up at the aerial traffic and skyscrapers against the bright sky

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on the aerial traffic, showing multiple flying vehicles passing against the bright blue sky. The palm trees frame the bottom of the shot while futuristic skyscrapers rise on the right. The scene emphasizes the vertical scale of the city and the busy air traffic above the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet waterfront promenade up to an elevated observation deck overlooking a bustling futuristic skyline. It begins with a panoramic sweep of a sun-drenched bay lined with palm trees and green benches before the camera turns to move forward along the walkway. As the camera passes pedestrians and a distinctive red building, the perspective shifts toward a wide concrete staircase, ascending past other walkers to reach an upper promenade. The scene then expands from this elevated vantage point, gliding past seated observers to reveal floating platforms and a distant bridge on the water. Finally, the camera tilts upward from the palm-lined path to focus on flying vehicles weaving between towering skyscrapers against a bright blue sky.
